Door.Access.Connector.UDP

类 UDPClientConnector

  • java.lang.Object
    • Door.Access.Connector.AbstractConnector
      • Door.Access.Connector.UDP.UDPClientConnector
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    INConnector, java.lang.Runnable

    public class UDPClientConnector
extends AbstractConnector
